curation_notes: The patch commit changed 3 non-test source files (Screen.php, Layout.php, Repository.php) plus a config file. The core fix is in extractState() which replaced unserialize() with Crypt::decrypt(), and serializableState() which replaced serialize(new SerializableClosure(...)) with Crypt::encrypt(). Both functions are listed as locations: extractState is the entry point where untrusted _state parameter data is deserialized, and serializableState is the counterpart that previously used serialize() with only optional base64 encoding (no integrity protection). The vulnerability class insecure-deserialization was confirmed from CWE-502, the advisory description, and the patch diff which directly removes the unserialize() call.
